title: nephrodium undulatum
intro: Nephrodium undulatum, also known as the Lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Nephrodium undulatum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and acting as a diuretic to help with urinary issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often dried, ground into powder, and used as a tea, or added to tinctures and infusions to leverage its medicinal properties.
